based_on.manual_overlap_review: comment-backed passport plus deterministic matrix preflight; accepted despite overlap-heavy warning because it adds one clean creative/multimodal gap and two strong adjacent practitioner viewpoints

routing_notes: Strong fit for Claude Skills, Skill Conductor, Agent Second Brain, personal/local agent setup, and practical packaging of expertise into reusable AI workflows.
Useful for creative and marketing AI workflows, especially AI presentations, image workflows, and multimodal production patterns.

Community signal is now available in DB and packet; sampled comments under Agent Second Brain / Outline VPN / Skill Conductor posts show troubleshooting, deployment feedback, gratitude for open-source tools, and practical questions. The Gemini passport summarizes this signal but does not cite concrete .C comment refs.
Deterministic preflight is overlap-heavy, so route him as a complement in agent/prompt areas rather than as the default generic coding-agent expert.
Do not route as a deep backend architecture, local-LLM infrastructure, enterprise governance, or security/compliance source.
Treat platform bypass and restriction-workaround posts as platform-risk content, not enterprise-safe recommendations.
recommended_manifest_caveat: accepted as Skills / personal-local agent / creative-multimodal workflow expert; comments are available and sampled DB evidence shows troubleshooting/tool-use feedback, though the Gemini passport did not cite concrete .C comment refs; overlap-heavy with existing agent/prompt experts, so use as complementary source for Claude Skills, Agent Second Brain, local agent setup, and AI presentation/image workflows; treat platform bypass posts as platform-risk and avoid routing for deep backend architecture, enterprise governance, generic security/compliance, or generic model news
